missingRuntimeContext: Quiz widget is available only inside the application runtime surface.
loadBundleError: Failed to load the widget client bundle.
loadQuizError: Failed to load quiz content from the widget script.
emptyDescription: Attach an active widget script to the current catalog or metahub and expose a mount() method to render quiz content here.
answersCaptured: Answers captured locally. Add a submit() method in the widget script to validate them.
excellent: Excellent! You really know your space.
good: Good job! Keep exploring the cosmos.
tryAgain: Nice try! Study up and try again.
